description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with blue accents on the wings, tail, and lower fuselage, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, featuring a dark-tinted canopy with side windows for visibility. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The overall design suggests a light utility or training aircraft suitable for short flights and urban airfields.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with blue and white coloring, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-wing configuration, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, wing struts, and the blue-and-white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with conventional stabilizers and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, propeller, and tail details, mirroring the left side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single fixed nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
